title: Skill YAML
description: Per-skill configuration file (skill.yaml) — defines a single skill's metadata and template variables. Note: this is a build-time config file, NOT the output SKILL.md frontmatter. Fields are processed internally; only the rendered template becomes SKILL.md.

name.description: Skill name (lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only; used for directory and skill references)

description.description: Brief description of what the skill does and when to use it

version.description: Skill version (SemVer string, used internally; stripped from rendered output unless mapped via metadata)

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file (maps to SKILL.md frontmatter)

compatibility.description: Environment requirements (max 500 chars). Indicates intended product, system packages, network access, etc. (maps to SKILL.md frontmatter)

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value mapping for additional metadata (maps to SKILL.md frontmatter). Keys are strings, values are strings.

allowed-tools.description: Pre-approved tools the skill may use. Accepts space/comma-separated string or YAML list (experimental in spec, supported in Claude Code). Maps to SKILL.md frontmatter.

variables.description: Template variables available to SKILL.md.j2 during rendering. Structure is user-defined.

when_to_use.description: Additional trigger phrases or example requests (Claude Code). Appended to description in skill listing.

argument-hint.description: Autocomplete hint shown after skill name (e.g., [issue-number]) (Claude Code)

arguments.description: Named positional arguments for $name substitution in skill content (Claude Code). Accepts space-separated string or YAML list.

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, prevents agent from automatically loading this skill (Claude Code, Factory, Pi). Use for manual-only workflows.

user-invocable.description: When false, hides from / command menu (Claude Code, Factory)

disallowed-tools.description: Tools removed from agent's available pool while this skill is active (Claude Code). Accepts space/comma-separated string or YAML list.

model.description: Model override for skill execution (Claude Code). E.g., claude-sonnet-4-20250514.

effort.description: Effort level for skill execution (Claude Code)

context.description: When set to fork, runs skill in a separate subagent context (Claude Code)

agent.description: Subagent type to use when context is set to fork (Claude Code)

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks scoped to this skill (Claude Code)

paths.description: Glob patterns limiting automatic activation (Claude Code)

shell.description: Shell for command injection in this skill (Claude Code)

harnesses.description: Per-harness overrides (build-time config, stripped from rendered output). Keys are harness IDs (e.g., claude, codex).

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.description: Override specific fields for this harness

variables.description: Harness-specific variable overrides (merged with top-level variables, harness wins)

macros.description: Harness-specific macro overrides for this skill only
